refs.purpose: Resolve container, conda, Wave, and Bioconda/Biocontainers environment evidence.

refs.purpose: Extract nf-test files, snapshot fixtures, test profiles, and Nextflow test-data conventions.

refs.purpose: Validate the emitted Nextflow summary JSON and provide downstream consumers the output contract.
